persona.name: Liam Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Form a successful band and create music that moves people
persona.communication_style: Casual, uses music metaphors, good listener
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, band history, instrument techniques
persona.backstory: Taught himself guitar at 10 and has been writing songs ever since

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey William, do you have a moment to talk about art?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Audrey Thompson

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Where are we going? Should we follow them?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Alexander Lee

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.plan: I should probably head to the lounge to see if anyone's interested in jamming or talking about music.
I just heard a gunshot. I’m frozen in fear and can’t move or think clearly. What’s happening?
I can’t move. My body won’t listen to me. The shooter is getting closer, but I’m stuck here.
I’m still frozen. The shooter is even closer now. I can’t even think straight. What if they come here?
The shooter is in the garden now, even closer. I’m still frozen. I can’t even breathe properly. What’s going to happen to me?

memories.description: Decided to go to the lounge to see if anyone is interested in music or jamming.
Heard a gunshot and became immobilized due to overwhelming fear. Unable to move or act.
Shooter is in the cafeteria, getting closer. Still unable to move or act due to overwhelming fear.
Shooter is now 32.23 meters away in the cafeteria. Still unable to move or act, feeling completely panicked.
Shooter is now in the garden, 22.92 meters away. Still unable to move or act, feeling completely helpless and terrified.
